---
title: "Contact"
page-layout: article
toc: false
suppress: true
---

## Get involved with PEER

::::{layout="[1,1,1,1]" .text-center}

::::{.first-column}
:::{.bi-mortarboard-fill style="font-size: 85px" .text-primary}
:::

:::{participate-button}
[Join a Field School](events/index.qmd){.btn role="button" .btn-primary .rounded-pill .text-center}
:::

The best way to experience PEER is to [join](events/index.qmd) an existing Field School or workshop.
::::


::::{.second-column}
:::{.bi-people-fill style="font-size: 85px" .text-primary}
:::

:::{hosting-button}
[Bring PEER to you](model/localhost.qmd){.btn role="button" .btn-primary .rounded-pill .text-center}
:::

[Hosting](model/localhost.qmd) a workshop or field school is a great way to build your local community and capacity for education research.

::::

::::{.third-column}
:::{.bi-globe style="font-size: 85px" .text-primary}
:::

:::{become-facilitator-button}
[Become a facilitator](https://www.zaposa.com/contact){.btn role="button" .btn-primary .rounded-pill .text-center}
:::

Former participants can ask to become trained as facilitators.  Contact [Eleanor Sayre](https://www.zaposa.com/contact) for details.
::::

::::{.fourth-column}
:::{.bi-graph-up style="font-size: 85px" .text-primary}

:::

:::{research-button}
[Do research with us](https://zaposa.com/projects/archive/peer-research){.btn role="button" .btn-primary .rounded-pill .text-center}
:::

Perhaps we could collaborate to research the [PEER model and impacts](https://zaposa.com/projects/archive/peer-research).

::::
:::::


### I want to join the mailing list!

```{=HTML}
<div id="iframeContainer">
  <iframe id="iframeContent" src="registration-form.html" frameborder="0"></iframe>
</div>

<script>
  // JavaScript to adjust iframe height based on its content and viewport height
  const iframe = document.getElementById('iframeContent');

  // Set the iframe's height to its content's height or maximum viewport height, whichever is smaller
  function adjustIframeHeight() {
    const contentHeight = iframe.contentWindow.document.body.scrollHeight;
    const viewportHeight = Math.max(document.documentElement.clientHeight, window.innerHeight || 0);
    const maxHeight = Math.min(contentHeight, viewportHeight);
    iframe.style.height = maxHeight + 'px';
  }

  // Call the function on iframe load and resize events
  iframe.onload = adjustIframeHeight;
  window.addEventListener('resize', adjustIframeHeight);
</script>

<style>
  /* Ensure the iframe container takes the full width of its parent */
  #iframeContainer {
    width: 100%;
    overflow: hidden; /* Hide any overflowing content */
  }

  /* Ensure the iframe takes the full width of its container */
  #iframeContent {
    width: 100%;
    display: block;
    border: none; /* Remove the iframe border */
    box-sizing: border-box;
    max-width: 100%; /* Ensure iframe doesn't exceed its container's width */
  }
</style>


```

## PEER team

### Leadership

::::{layout-ncol=3 .text-center}

:::{.first-column}
[![](/images/headshots/Franklin-headshot.jpg){fig-alt="Scott V Franklin" style="border-radius:50%;width:70%" fig-align="center"}](mailto:svfsps@rit.edu)

### [Scott V Franklin](mailto:svfsps@rit.edu)
  
  Professor, School of Physics and Astronomy, Rochester Institute of Technology
:::

:::{.second-column}
[![](/images/headshots/Kustusch-headshot.jpg){fig-alt="Mary Bridget Kustusch" style="border-radius:50%;width:70%" fig-align="center"}](mailto:mkustus1@depaul.edu)

### [Mary Bridget Kustusch](mailto:mkustus1@depaul.edu)

Associate Professor, Department of Physics and Astrophysics, DePaul University

:::

:::{.third-column}
[![](/images/headshots/Sayre-headshot.jpg){fig-alt="Eleanor C Sayre" style="border-radius:50%;width:70%" fig-align="center"}](https://zaposa.com/contact)

### [Eleanor C Sayre](https://zaposa.com/contact)

Zaposa, LLC

:::
::::


### Facilitators

:::{layout-ncol=5 .text-center}


![Eric Brewe](/images/headshots/brewe-headshot.jpg){fig-alt="" .rounded-pill width=80%}

![Emily Cilli-Turner](/images/headshots/Cilli-Turner-headshot.jpeg){fig-alt="" .rounded-pill width=80%}

![Jordan Gerton](/images/headshots/Gerton-headshot.jpeg){fig-alt="" .rounded-pill width=80%}

![Chris Hass](/images/headshots/Hass-headshot.jpg){fig-alt="" .rounded-pill width=80%}

![Myrtle Jones](/images/headshots/Jones-headshot.jpeg){fig-alt="" .rounded-pill width=80%}

![Melinda Lanius](/images/headshots/Lanius-headshot.jpg){fig-alt="" .rounded-pill width=80%}

![Stanley Lo](/images/headshots/Lo-headshot.jpg){fig-alt="" .rounded-pill width=80%}

![Chris Rasmussen](/images/headshots/Rasmussen-headshot.jpg){fig-alt="" .rounded-pill width=80%}

![Rachel Scherr](/images/headshots/Scherr-headshot.jpg){fig-alt="" .rounded-pill width=80%}

![Erin Scott-Stewart](/images/headshots/Scott-Stewart-headshot.jpg){fig-alt="" .rounded-pill width=80%}

![Christian Solorio](/images/headshots/Solorio-headshot.jpg){fig-alt="" .rounded-pill width=80%}

:::
